description: Creates a vertical line passing through a point or at a given x-coordinate.
utility: Create a vertical line through a point or x-coordinate

arguments.name: point
arguments.description: Point to pass through, or x-coordinate for the vertical line

alternates.description: Vertical line passing through a point (or vline(G, x) for x-coordinate)

examples.scenario: Vertical lines for parabola ray intersection points
